rulings.Case Title: MILTON TURNER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al

rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, AUGUST 19, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Plaintiffs MILTON TURNER, DELORIS TURNER'S motion to compel defendant Georgia Pacific¿s taking of deposition and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)
